mapper.select: select count(*) from t_service_order where DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
select count(*) from t_safety_alert where DATE(alert_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_service_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT alert_type as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM t_safety_alert GROUP BY alert_type
SELECT order_status as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM t_service_order GROUP BY order_status
SELECT star_level as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM t_service_evaluation GROUP BY star_level ORDER BY star_level
